ats.description: Check ATS compatibility, keyword match, parsing risk, and formatting issues.

bullets.description: Rewrite resume bullets into achievement-focused statements with stronger action, scope, metrics, and impact.

quantify.description: Find credible opportunities to add metrics, ranges, scale, before/after deltas, and impact evidence.

format.description: Improve resume layout, structure, readability, and ATS-safe formatting.

sections.description: Build or improve resume summaries, skills sections, experience sections, education, and supplemental sections.

analyze-job.description: Analyze a job posting, extract requirements, score fit, identify gaps, and recommend an application strategy.

tailor.description: Customize a resume for a specific job posting while preserving truthfulness.

versions.description: Manage a master resume and multiple tailored versions with naming, tracking, and update workflows.

cover-letter.description: Create a personalized cover letter from candidate evidence, target role, and company context.

linkedin.description: Optimize LinkedIn headline, About, Experience, keywords, and recruiter visibility.

portfolio-case-study.description: Turn resume bullets and project notes into detailed portfolio case studies.

references.description: Prepare professional reference lists, request scripts, and reference briefing notes.

interview.description: Generate STAR stories, likely interview questions, talking points, and prep plans.

salary.description: Research market compensation and prepare negotiation strategy, talking points, and counteroffer scripts.

compare-offers.description: Compare multiple job offers by total compensation, risk, growth, lifestyle, and strategic fit.

tech.description: Optimize resumes for software engineering, PM, data, DevOps, and other technical roles.

executive.description: Build executive resumes for VP, C-suite, board, and senior leadership roles.

academic-cv.description: Build academic CVs with publications, grants, teaching, research, service, and references.

creative.description: Balance creative portfolio presentation with ATS compatibility for design, writing, marketing, and creative roles.

career-change.description: Translate experience, skills, and achievements for a career or industry transition.
